text: Seahorse Agent supports three LLM providers: Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT-4, and any OpenRouter-compatible model.
To configure the LLM model, set the SEAHORSE_LLM_MODEL environment variable. Example: SEAHORSE_LLM_MODEL=openrouter/anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet
The SEAHORSE_HTTP_PORT environment variable controls which port the HTTP server listens on. Default is 3001.
The SEAHORSE_EMBED_MODEL variable selects the embedding model for RAG. Default: openrouter/openai/text-embedding-3-small
The SEAHORSE_MAX_STEPS variable limits the number of ReAct reasoning steps per agent run. Default is 10.
To enable OpenTelemetry tracing export to Jaeger, set OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:4317 and run docker compose up -d.
The agent workspace for file operations is controlled by SEAHORSE_WORKSPACE. Default: ./workspace directory.
dev.sh is a convenience script that sets all required environment variables and rebuilds the binary when dependencies change.
